retrieved_result: How to Change Eye Color Naturally Though we're all born with a certain eye color, it doesn't mean we can't play with the shade. Although subtle, there are some natural ways to change up the appearance of your eye color. Tweaking your eye color doesn't require much money and can actually be done from the comfort of your own home. Col
